scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm --prefix apps/web run dev" "npm --prefix apps/api run dev" "PB_ENCRYPTION_KEY=naturelap_dev_encryption_key_123 PB_SUPERUSER_EMAIL=admin@naturelap.local PB_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD=naturelap_dev_admin_pw npm --prefix apps/pocketbase run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm --prefix apps/api run start" "PB_ENCRYPTION_KEY=naturelap_dev_encryption_key_123 PB_SUPERUSER_EMAIL=admin@naturelap.local PB_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD=naturelap_dev_admin_pw npm --prefix apps/pocketbase run start"
scripts.lint: concurrently --raw "npm --prefix apps/web run lint" "npm --prefix apps/api run lint"
